home.heroDesc: A real-time collaborative todo list. Create a list, share it with friends or teammates, and see changes appear instantly — even across different devices.
home.noBoards: No lists yet. Create one below, or ask someone to add you to theirs.
home.pwaDesc: Install TateTodo on your device for quick access — it works like a native app, even offline.
home.pwaIos: On iPhone or iPad: tap the Share button in Safari, then choose "Add to Home Screen".

board.title: To-Do List
board.headingHint: Tip: start an item with # to make it a heading.
board.shareLink: Enable share link (anyone with the URL can access)
board.accessDeniedMsg: You don't have permission to view this list.
board.motivational: Great work today! It's okay if not every task is done. What matters is making a little progress every day. Wishing you a wonderful tomorrow.

mcp.title: MCP Server Setup:
mcp.description: Read and write your lists from AI agents (Claude, etc.). Public boards don't require authentication. Private boards require a token.
mcp.tokenLabel: Your current token (copy and use in the commands below):
mcp.tokenWarning: ⚠️ This token is valid for 30 days. After it expires, log in again to get a new token and update your config.
mcp.claudeDesktopNote: Click your name in the lower left → Settings → Developer → Edit Config, or edit the file directly:
mcp.claudeDesktopProxy: Claude Desktop doesn't support HTTP directly, so connect via the mcp-remote proxy (Node.js required).
